name: Hazelcast JCA Resource Adapter
shortDescription: The Hazelcast JCA resource adapter Community project is a system-level software driver used by a Java application to connect to an Hazelcast Cluster.
longDescription:
Hazelcast JCA resource adapter is a system-level software driver used by a Java application to connect to an Hazelcast Cluster.
 
  This module is developed and supported by the Community contributor.
